profile.name: Elena Kowalski
profile.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
profile.bio: Embedded Systems Engineer with 5 years shipping validated, production-grade firmware where hardware meets software. I build test automation and low-level debugging tooling that harden reliability across sensor, power, and communication subsystems. I care about deterministic behavior and reproducible validation.
